message:
fix(blob-leases): remove stale refcount entries and prevent lock-held IO in SimpleTempDir::del_ref

Rewrite del_ref to fix two issues:

1. Terminal refcount entries were kept at 0 instead of being removed
   from the HashMap, causing unbounded memory growth over time as
   content IDs accumulated with zero refcount. Now removes the entry
   from the map before performing file cleanup.

2. The mutex was held during std::fs::remove_file, which performs IO
   and could block other threads waiting to add/drop refs. Now drops
   the lock before the file removal.

Also handle duplicate drop calls gracefully (treat as no-op instead
of the previous empty branch with a comment), which can happen during
concurrent teardown races.

Add tests verifying terminal ref entry removal and duplicate drop
idempotency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
